name: feature.image-gen.agents
description: Image Generator agent (ADR 0115). Drives the text-to-image node through chat — composes the existing AI chat + the core.openwop.ai.image-generate node; no new chat system. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Image Generator
agents.description: Generates images from a text prompt and returns them as chat artifacts. Uses openwop:core.openwop.ai.image-generate; honest-off (host_capability_missing) when no image provider is wired.
